reforms.description: The UK government has modified capital gains tax to lower rates on long-term investment and adjusted tax reliefs related to access to venture capital and high-risk investments, aiming to stimulate innovation and adaptability in the economy.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Lowering capital gains tax and adjusting tax reliefs encourages investment in innovative ventures, which can enhance economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been enacted and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly alters the tax landscape for venture capital but does not constitute a major overhaul of the system.
reforms.source_quote: The government has modified capital gains tax in the March 1998 Budget to lower rates on long-term investment and adjusted tax reliefs relating to access to venture capital and high-risk investments.

reforms.description: The Welfare to Work programme aims to reduce youth and long-term unemployment by providing wage subsidies and training opportunities for disadvantaged groups, including young people and lone parents.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the skills and employability of disadvantaged groups, the programme supports the development of a more skilled workforce, which can benefit innovative firms.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been launched and is actively providing support.
reforms.importance_rationale: The programme represents a significant structural change in addressing unemployment and enhancing workforce skills.
reforms.source_quote: The New Deal, or Welfare to Work initiative, is the first major element in the government’s employability strategy.

reforms.description: The UK government intends to establish a University for Industry to deliver lifelong learning opportunities and serve as a clearing house for other learning opportunities, aimed at improving workforce adaptability.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing lifelong learning opportunities, the initiative aims to enhance the skills of the workforce, which is essential for fostering innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative has been publicly announced but is not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, the initiative is not as transformative as other major reforms.
reforms.source_quote: The government also intends to establish a University for Industry which will deliver lifelong learning opportunities and serve as a clearing house on other learning opportunities.

reforms.description: The UK government announced the introduction of a national minimum wage to address low pay and promote fairness in the workplace, with a Low Pay Commission established to recommend its level and design features.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Implementing a national minimum wage can improve worker productivity and economic stability, which supports innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been publicly announced and is pending implementation.
reforms.importance_rationale: The introduction of a national minimum wage is a significant structural change in labor policy.
reforms.source_quote: The Government is committed to introducing a national minimum wage to remove the worst excesses of low pay and ensure greater decency and fairness in the workplace.
